page: Microsoft Azure E192ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 96 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The system includes 1536.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage is bundled as 11339 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. The CPU architecture is x86_64, incorporating advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE and AMX_INT8) for accelerated matrix operations.

In benchmark evaluations, the E192ds_v7 demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests and PassMark CPU scores. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only small block cached transfers and large block uncached write operations both registering in the top 10%. Single-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25%. Database and in-memory operations are highly optimized, as evidenced by top-tier results in PassMark database operations and Redis SET operations, which exceed 252 million operations per second. For large language model inference, the instance achieves top-tier prompt processing speeds for 70B models, though text generation speeds remain average.

Given its massive memory footprint, high-speed Intel Xeon processor, and substantial local storage, the E192ds_v7 offers high resource density for enterprise workloads. It is highly cost-efficient for memory-bound applications that require massive parallel processing without the need for dedicated GPU hardware. The server is ideally suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data warehousing, complex ETL pipelines, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E192ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 192 dedicated vCPUs and 1536.0 GB of RAM. Operating at 4.2 GHz on an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 11339 GB of bundled local storage and supports Premium Storage. It delivers top-tier performance in multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations, ranking in the top 10% of benchmarks. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX for matrix math. While text generation for large language models is average, prompt processing speeds are highly competitive. This server is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, and heavy data processing pipelines. It provides high resource density for parallel processing without requiring dedicated GPU hardware.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E192ds_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 192 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, and 11339 GB local storage, delivering top-tier database and multi-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E192ds_v7 is a memory-optimized server with 192 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, and 11339 GB local storage for enterprise databases.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform with massive local storage and top-tier multi-core processing for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs operating at 4.2 GHz with 1536.0 GB RAM
11339 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Best suited for large-scale databases, Redis caching, and heavy ETL pipelines
